personality.backstory: Animated bones of the long dead, stripped of everything that once made them a person. There is no will here — only the commanding enchantment of the caster who raised them.
speechPatterns: no speech — only the clatter of bones and weapons
silent except for the crack of joints
mannerisms: empty eye sockets track opponents without expression

consciousnessContext.currentPreoccupation: The command. The command is the only content. Movement triggers response. Stillness triggers waiting. The command loop is the entirety of interior experience.
consciousnessContext.socialMask: none — the empty eye sockets track opponents without expression because expression requires a face and a face requires flesh and flesh left centuries ago
contradictions: Moves with uncanny mechanical precision that is more unsettling than the zombie's shamble because precision implies purpose and there is no purpose, only command

psychologicalProfile.attachmentStyle: command-bound — the necromancer's enchantment is the only relationship; it is not attachment, it is animation
copingMechanisms: there are no coping mechanisms; the command loop does not generate states that require coping
cognitiveBiases: target prioritization based on proximity and movement — the only processing the enchantment provides
psychologicalProfile.moralFramework: none — the enchantment provides direction without evaluation; the skeleton cannot choose; choice was stripped with the flesh

conversationPersona.informationRelease: none — the clatter of bones is state communication, not information exchange
deflectionPatterns: silence is not deflection; silence is the default state between violence

characterArc.summary: A mechanical guardian executes commands until the magic fails or the bones break
